title: Resume news test branch A after remote result-chain false positive; continue branch B in parallel
objective: Resume the original two-branch task. Branch A must continue from 5-agent topology provisioning and drive the news test workflow to two real cycles. Branch B must continue in parallel on the cycle-filter dropdown/UI work. The previously reported remote /api/v1/results persistence blocker is now cleared and must not be reused as a generic stop reason.

references.description: Fresh evidence that smoke and provisioning-class probes now have terminal results and the previous remote result-persistence blocker is cleared.
The old branch A blocker file that is now superseded by the fresh repair evidence.
Role and cycle semantics for the 5-role news workflow.

parallel_branches.title: Resume 5-agent deployment and complete two cycles

required_work.description: Resume branch A from topology provisioning, using the already-proven single-child onboarding path as the immediate provisioning template.
Provision or verify all 5 required agents: openclaw-33 as manager, plus four derived subagents for editor, worker-33, worker-xhs, and tester.
Ensure the news test group exists, all five agents are joined, and the role binding for the 5-role workflow is authoritative.
Deploy the 5-role news workflow. Do not silently downgrade to the old 3-role simple news workflow.
Run the first real cycle to a terminal workflow closeout or the first precise blocker.
Run the second real cycle in the same group. It must be a real second round, not a replay or duplication of cycle 1.
Collect evidence that cycle 1 and cycle 2 are distinct in workflow state, messages, and artifacts.

acceptance: The 5-agent topology is real and authoritative.
The deployed workflow remains the 5-role news workflow, not a silent fallback to the old 3-role version.
Two real cycles complete, or the first precise blocker is surfaced with evidence.
Cycle identity evidence exists for both cycles.
do_not: Do not reuse the cleared remote result-persistence blocker as a generic explanation for any new failure.
Do not declare remote persistence broken again unless fresh evidence proves smoke plus provisioning probe both fail in the same repair window.
Do not fake cycle 2 by copying cycle 1 artifacts or logs.
Do not silently substitute unrelated agents for the required four derived subagents.

parallel_branches.title: Continue cycle-filter dropdown implementation and validation

required_work.description: Resume the existing UI branch rather than restarting from zero.
Complete the dropdown in the conversation module top-right and bind it to real cycle metadata.
Validate all-cycles / cycle 1 / cycle 2 filtering against the news test group after two real cycles exist.

acceptance: Dropdown visible in the requested top-right location.
Cycle 1 filter shows only cycle 1 conversation content.
Cycle 2 filter shows only cycle 2 conversation content.
All-cycles restores the mixed conversation view.
do_not: Do not stall branch B solely because branch A previously had a cleared infrastructure blocker.
Do not use brittle text guessing instead of explicit cycle mapping.

controller_requirements.parallel_execution_rule: Run branch A and branch B in parallel. Branch B must not remain idle just because branch A had an earlier infrastructure repair.
controller_requirements.blocker_discipline_rule: A task that is still running is not automatically a broken result-persistence case. Do not reclassify it as infrastructure failure without fresh decisive evidence.
controller_requirements.evidence_rule: Each branch must keep its own evidence trail, then the main controller must publish one final structured summary for both branches.

deliverables.description: Evidence folder for the resumed branch A work, continuing branch B work, and final closeout.

working_principles: The previous remote result-persistence blocker is cleared. Resume the real task instead of re-litigating the cleared blocker.
Evidence beats narration. Fresh evidence is required for any new blocker classification.
Parallel branches stay parallel unless there is a proven hard dependency.
Do not silently simplify away the 5-agent and two-cycle requirements.
